Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "TROPICALFEVER-0A00-1000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tropical Fever.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0A00 which: 1. Copies 512 bytes of data from $0A20 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Sets the CIA #2 Port B data direction register ($DD03) to $02 3. Sets the stack pointer to $F9 4. It then jumps to the entry point at $1000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the manipulation of the stack)
